hero.sub: Analytics Engineer at FundedNext with 3+ years of building data tools, automating analytics, and making teams self-sufficient with data. Based in Dhaka, Bangladesh.
hero.quote: I may lose everything tomorrow, but what's the best thing I can do than trying!

paragraphs: I'm Saidul Alam Rahat — an Analytics Engineer at FundedNext, one of the world's fastest-growing prop trading firms. I sit at the intersection of data engineering and analytics — building tools, automating pipelines, and designing systems that make teams self-sufficient with data rather than dependent on analysts.

My path wasn't typical. I studied HRM, pivoted through business development, and found my thing in data — specifically the part where you take an ambiguous question like "why did revenue drop?" and turn it into a clear, visual answer that changes how people act.

I've built self-service analytics platforms that cut recurring data requests by 80%, designed custom retention taxonomies adopted as team standards, and created automated alerting systems that catch anomalies before they become problems. Recognized as a "data visualization maestro" by NEXT Ventures with the Invent & Simplify award.

items.title: Sr. Executive, Business Intelligence
bullets: Lead data-driven initiatives supporting product development and strategic decisions across multiple business units
Build and maintain dashboards using Metabase, Power BI, Looker Studio, and advanced Google Sheets to monitor KPIs
Perform complex data analyses with SQL and Python to guide product feature decisions and operational improvements
Support hypothesis-driven experiments by collecting and analyzing data pre- and post-launch of new product features

items.title: Sr. Executive (Data & RnD), Business Development
bullets: Performed product analysis, evaluated impact, and drove continuous improvement while extracting key insights
Designed KPI frameworks and created data structures for reporting across multiple business units
Automated recurring reporting workflows, reducing manual analysis time by 30%
Led ambiguity-heavy analytical initiatives — identifying root causes and delivering actionable insights

items.title: Executive, Business Development
bullets: Provided detailed analyses and insights to key stakeholders, supporting strategic, data-driven decision-making
Partnered with product, marketing, and engineering teams to define metrics and deliver SQL-driven insights
Maintained documentation, workflows, and research repositories using Notion and internal tools

items.title: Intern
bullets: Designed Walton's revised "Recruitment & Selection" policy, projected to reduce the recruiting lifecycle by 47%
Negotiated MOU Corporate Agreements as part of the HR Branding team, managing a database of ~150 organizations
Contributed to the "Better Bangladesh Tomorrow" initiative — volunteer platform and branding plans

items.title: Facilitator
bullets: Led an 8-member team to develop a data-driven capstone project for the ICT Career Bootcamp

featured.title: Insight Agent
featured.description: A self-service analytics dashboard that replaced ad-hoc SQL queries for a prop trading firm. 6 purpose-built pages covering core metrics, breach analysis, customer flow tracking, retention taxonomy, business knowledge base, and product update timelines. Automated email alerts catch anomalies before they escalate.

cards.title: CodeBridge
cards.description: A private-to-public code publishing pipeline. Scans codebases for secrets, schema names, and business terms, builds an anonymization mapping (human-approved), then applies consistent replacements across all files. Supports incremental updates for already-published repos.

cards.title: TrustPilot Web Scraper
cards.description: Python scraper for extracting structured review data from Trustpilot. Built for competitive analysis and learning web scraping fundamentals.

cards.title: Fun Projects
cards.description: A collection of small web experiments and creative coding — built for fun and to explore front-end technologies.

portfolio.title: Looker Studio Dashboard
portfolio.description: KPI monitoring dashboard with sample data for demonstration

portfolio.title: Google Sheets Reporting
portfolio.description: Advanced reporting system with automated formulas

items.title: Invent & Simplify — Stellar Night
items.description: Recognized by NEXT Ventures as a "data visualization maestro" for significantly amplifying data-driven decisions, fueling revenue growth and abuser detection, while propelling cross-functional data visibility.

items.title: Promoted to Sr. Executive
items.description: Promoted to Sr. Executive, Business Development at NEXT Ventures. Signed by the CSO and CEO for contribution towards making NEXT Ventures what it is today.

items.title: Ennovators 4.0 — Banglalink
items.description: Top 100 out of 16,000 participants in the C-Factor Gamification round.

items.title: Excelsior — NSU Finance Club
items.description: Top 50 out of 300 in an Inter-University MS Excel competition.

contact.description: I'm always open to discussing data engineering, analytics tools, or new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to connect — reach out.
